agentNote: Round 6 codeRefs extractor fix shipped. WHAT: extracted collectCodeRefs + collectArticleReferences from src/sessions/service.ts:703 into a new module src/sessions/handoff-extractors.ts. Fixed regex bug: original `[^\`]+\\.(ts|...)` matched any backticked content ending in a code extension, so \`pnpm test tests/foo.test.ts\` was being captured as a single file path entry in the codeRefs frontmatter. New regex requires no-whitespace path-shape: `[a-zA-Z_][\\w./-]*\\.(ts|...)(:[0-9]+)?`. Also added :line suffix support (previously dropped) and extended extension list to include mjs, cjs, json, yml, yaml, toml. NEXT: Verify the rendered handoff for this very session has codeRefs ONLY with legitimate paths like src/sessions/handoff-extractors.ts:NN, NOT with \`pnpm test ...\` commands. WATCH-OUT: do NOT collapse the path: citation extractor into the same regex — they handle different input shapes (path: is a citation marker, backticked is markdown). VERIFY with pnpm test tests/unit/sessions/handoff-extractors.test.ts (20 new tests) and inspect this handoff's codeRefs frontmatter to confirm no test commands captured.
